text.title: feature-flags-core-implementation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for feature-flags-core-implementation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents add if flag_enabled("foo") at every call site instead of at a single decision point.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Scattered flag checks multiply branches exponentially. A flag should wrap the outermost decision, not be sprinkled inside helper functions.

failure-mode.description: Generating a flag-eval client with default=True so tests pass locally.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A True default leaks the new feature to 100% of production traffic when the flag is not yet configured in the flag store.

failure-mode.description: Targeting rules that pass entire user objects to the flag service.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: User objects often contain PII; flag services log evaluation context. Whitelist only the attributes needed for targeting (id, tier, groups).
